methodsAttempted.query: site:ut.ac.ir artificial intelligence policy academic integrity ChatGPT University of Tehran
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned mostly University of Tehran journal articles and PDFs about AI, which were treated as research-only unless they contained operational policy text.
Search results included official UT journal PDFs and a faculty news item; these were not used as binding university-wide policy evidence.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ut.ac.ir "academic integrity" "University of Tehran" policy students
methodsAttempted.notes: A University of Tehran journal publication ethics page was identified with an explicit Artificial Intelligence Usage Policy.

artifacts.summary: Official-domain discovery found one usable UT-owned journal ethics page with AI usage policy text. Other UT-domain AI results were research articles, PDFs, or news-like items and were rejected for policy extraction.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Journal of Entrepreneurship Development - Publication Ethics
artifacts.queryUsed: site:ut.ac.ir "academic integrity" "University of Tehran" policy students
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official UT subdomain page for a journal whose page states Publisher and Owner: University of Tehran; contains an explicit Artificial Intelligence Usage Policy. Claims are scoped to the journal page, not university-wide student policy.

targets.sourceTitle: Journal of Entrepreneurship Development - Publication Ethics

stopConditions: Stop after verified official source text supports narrow staged claim candidates.
Do not escalate to Playwright unless static HTTP or Firecrawl text extraction is insufficient.
Reject research articles, news, and generic pages that do not contain operational policy or guidance.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Journal of Entrepreneurship Development - Publication Ethics

artifacts.claimText: University of Tehran's Journal of Entrepreneurship Development states that AI tools are supportive aids, manuscripts are independently evaluated by expert human reviewers with final decisions made by humans, and AI use in writing or analyzing manuscripts must be disclosed in the article or submission documents.

citation.citationTitle: Journal of Entrepreneurship Development - Publication Ethics
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Journal of Entrepreneurship Development - Publication Ethics
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: AI tools are employed solely as supportive aids within ethical frameworks and scientific standards. All manuscripts will be independently evaluated by expert human reviewers, with final decisions made by humans. Any use of AI in writing or analyzing the manuscript must be transparently disclosed within the article or the submission documents.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow journal-scoped candidate. It must not be promoted as a university-wide AI policy without human review and broader official evidence.
Approved as a narrow journal-scoped privacy/confidentiality candidate based on exact source text.

artifacts.title: University of Tehran staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence found a University of Tehran-owned journal publication ethics page with an explicit AI usage policy. The resulting claims are scoped to the Journal of Entrepreneurship Development and should not be treated as a university-wide student or teaching policy.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central University of Tehran-wide generative AI student, teaching, or assessment policy was verified in this run.
Claims are limited to the Journal of Entrepreneurship Development publication ethics page owned by University of Tehran.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
